---
name: Research critique
about: Challenge a claim, assumption, definition, or framing choice
title: "[Critique] "
labels: research-critique
assignees: ""
---

## What should be critiqued?

Name the claim, assumption, definition, section, or framing choice.

## Why does it matter?

Explain the risk: overclaim, ambiguity, missing literature, false assumption,
bad incentive, unsafe framing, or another issue.

## Suggested change

Describe the smallest useful fix, softening, rewrite, or question to answer.

## References

Add links or citations if relevant.

## Safety check

- [ ] This issue does not include private, personal, sensitive, confidential, or
      non-consensual real-world information.
